title: Verify navigation to the previous screen
test_steps: Click on the back arrow icon in the Header/App Bar.
expected_result: The user should be redirected to the previous screen.

title: Search for a specific character
test_steps: Click on the magnifying glass icon in the Header/App Bar. | Enter the search term 'Michael' in the search input field. | Press the Enter key to perform the search.
expected_result: The search results for 'Michael' should be displayed.

title: Click on a character image to view details
test_steps: Click on the character image in the Character Section.
expected_result: The user should be redirected to the character details screen.

title: Click on a feature screenshot to view details
test_steps: Click on the feature screenshot in the Features Section.
expected_result: The user should be redirected to the feature details screen.

title: Click on a gang image to view details

expected_result: The user should be redirected to the gang details screen.

title: Click on a location map to view details

expected_result: The user should be redirected to the location details screen.

title: Click on a mission screenshot to view details

expected_result: The user should be redirected to the mission details screen.

title: Click on the advertisement section to view details
